overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a medieval coastal settlement at night. The character moves from a narrow torch-lit alley between timber buildings onto an open cobblestone path along the water, ascends stone stairs built into the cliffside, and walks along an upper terrace with panoramic views of the harbor city below, illuminated by burning braziers against a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between timber and stone buildings opening to coastal path

events.description: exits narrow passage between wooden buildings into open coastal path with view of water

agents.ego_description: walking through torch-lit alley and emerging onto open coastal cobblestone path

notable_agents.action: guard in armor holding torch, standing near timber-framed building entrance

entered.detail: dark wooden medieval building with timber framing
rough stone cliff face forming the left wall of the narrow passage
burning wooden brazier with orange flames and smoke
irregular cobblestone walkway winding between buildings
two-story medieval house with dark wooden beams and lit windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow torch-lit alley between wooden and stone structures, passing a burning campfire brazier on the left. Around 3 seconds, the scene opens to a coastal cobblestone path where a guard stands ahead near a timber-framed building, transitioning from enclosed to open space with the night sky becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal walkway with stone keep wall and cliffside view

events.description: passes guard standing against the stone wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the coastal path beside the large stone keep wall

notable_agents.action: guard holding torch, standing stationary against the stone keep wall

entered.detail: massive gray stone fortress wall with small windows
wooden fence along the cliff edge overlooking the water
wall-mounted iron torches with orange flames
faint orange lights of the distant harbor across the dark water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open coastal cobblestone path with a massive stone keep wall on the left and a wooden railing along the cliff edge to the right. The character passes a stationary guard holding a torch around 12 seconds, with the dark sea and distant harbor lights visible below against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending cliffside with burning braziers

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs built into the cliff face
reaches the top of the stairs and steps onto the upper terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the winding stone staircase alongside the cliff wall

entered.detail: weathered stone steps built into the cliffside with uneven surfaces
large stone pillars topped with burning fires

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a winding stone staircase built into the cliffside, passing large burning braziers mounted on stone pillars that cast dramatic orange light. The stone keep wall remains visible to the left while the right side opens to views of the sea below, transitioning from the lower path to the upper terrace level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace walkway with parapet overlooking harbor city

events.description: stops at stone parapet to look out over the harbor city view
resumes walking along the terrace path

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace, pausing to observe the panoramic city view, then continuing past guards

notable_agents.action: guard standing at parapet overlooking the city, holding torch

entered.detail: chest-high stone wall with crenellations overlooking the harbor
expansive view of the harbor city with numerous lit windows and buildings
small timber-framed structure attached to the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the upper cobblestone terrace with a stone parapet on the right overlooking a vast harbor city illuminated by countless distant lights. The character pauses around 45 seconds to take in the panoramic view of the water and cityscape, then continues past guards stationed along the wall, with large burning braziers providing warm light against the cool blue night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, torch-lit alleyway into an expansive panoramic view of a coastal harbor city at night. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow passage of wooden and stone structures, passing a burning brazier before the space opens onto a wide cobblestone path lined by a massive stone keep and a cliffside railing. As the camera moves along the waterfront, it passes a stationary guard and shifts upward, ascending a winding stone staircase illuminated by dramatic orange light from pillars of fire. The scene then expands onto an upper cobblestone terrace, where the perspective shifts from the enclosing walls to a vast vista of the illuminated cityscape and dark sea below. Finally, the camera glides past stationed guards and glowing braziers, capturing the contrast between the warm firelight and the cool blue of the night sky.
